author: marciabarnes
body: I've been wondering how people were doing this. Great idea and thank you for the wonderful Ryan collection. Now I'll be here at my computer for another hour or two. I'll be nice though. Thanks for the info and the vids.

author: Syzlak
body: You're missing “What Sin Replaces Love” from the Rollins Show…but other than that, you did well ;)

author: dblake02
body: I would include this Gold-era version of Touch, Feel and Lose from The Paridiso 2001. Though he was obviously blitzed out of his mind it was great when he put down the guitar and released his inner-Jagger. [http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9jj3bzTdZiI](http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=9jj3bzTdZiI)

author: Matt Burgess
body: Heh, I knew I would miss some! Totally forgot about the performance to tell you the truth, but now that you brought it up… yeah, absolutely love the rawness in that show. Man, this playlist could be expanded a few more hours, I'm sure…

author: Matt Burgess
body:
Hey dblake,  
You know, I'm not actually sure if I've seen that clip from the Paradiso before… and for some reason, that video won't load for me on Youtube right now (not having issues with any other videos, just that one); I'll keep trying, thanks for the suggestion!
